LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MICHAEL NADELMAN'S MOTION TO VOID THE JUDGMENT AND FOR LEAVE TO DEFEND THE ACTION IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEPTEMBER 21, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. THE PARTIES SHALL PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF ALL PAPERS FILED IN SUPPORT AND IN OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM SEPTEMBER 12, 2012. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-11-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MICHAEL NADELMAN'S MOTION TO VOID THE JUDGMENT AND FOR LEAVE TO DEFEND THE ACTION IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 16, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. COURTESY COPIES OF OPPOSITION PAPERWORK IS GIVEN TO COURTROOM STAFF. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-21-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT NADELMAN, MICHAEL
ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DEFAULT OF APR-19-2005 SET ASIDE, JUDGMENT OF APR-19-2005 SET ASIDE
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-16-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MICHAEL NADELMAN'S MOTION TO VOID THE JUDGMENT AND FOR LEAVE TO DEFEND THE ACTION IS GRANTED PER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 473(D). DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO FILE AN ANSWER NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 23, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Void The Judgment And For Leave To Defend The Action
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JOHN GORDON, ESQ., WINN LAW GROUP, 714.446.6686, FOR PLAINTIFF CALVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES.
MICHAEL NADELMAN, 650.290.3998, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT MICHAEL NADELMAN'S Motion To Void The Judgment And For Leave To Defend The Action is granted per Code of Civil Procedure 473(d). Defendant is required to file an answer no later than October 23, 2012. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Void The Judgment And For Leave To Defend The Action
Off Calendar Sep-21-2012 Continued To Oct-16-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ELIZABETH MACDONALD, ESQ., 415.922.5939, FOR PLAINTIFF CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES, LLC.
MICAHEL NADELMAN, 650.290.3998, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER.

RULING: Argued and the Court VACATED its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MICHAEL NADELMAN's Motion To Void The Judgment And For Leave To Defend The Action IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 16, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. COURTESY COPIES OF OPPOSITION PAPERWORK IS GIVEN TO COURTROOM STAFF. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Void The Judgment And For Leave To Defend The Action
Off Calendar Sep-11-2012 Continued To Sep-21-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: michael nadelman, 650.290.3998, defendant appearing in pro per; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MICHAEL NADELMAN'S Motion To Void The Judgment And For Leave To Defend The Action is Continued on the court's own motion to September 21, 2012 at 9:30 am. The parties shall provide courtesy copies of all papers filed in support and in opposition to the motion with a cover letter stating the new hearing date to Department 302 no later than 4pm September 12, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
